description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages bootstrap, flatpak, snap, vm, publish, update and reproducible. In the bootstrap stage add the bootstrap_ppc64 job (and its .bootstrap_template) that runs "make bootstrap" and always stores buildstream logs as artifacts, manual unless scheduled or tag/branch release. In the flatpak stage define app_aarch64, app_i686, app_ppc64le, app_riscv64, app_x86_64 and the hidden .app_loongarch64/.app_ppc64 jobs, each extending .flatpak_template and a .builder-<arch> to set ARCH, executing a sequence of make commands (test, build, check-debuginfo, export or test‑apps, ABI checks) and always publishing buildstream logs as artifacts; they run manually and may fail without breaking the pipeline. In the snap stage add .check-snap and its extensions .check_snap_i686 and .check_snap_x86_64, which run "make export-snap" followed by several "python3 utils/parse_review.py" calls and always archive logs. In the vm stage add .vm_efi_image_template and .vm_imageless_template jobs (and their extensions .desktop_efi_vm_image_loongarch64, .desktop_systemd_vm_loongarch64, .minimal_efi_vm_image_loongarch64, .minimal_systemd_vm_loongarch64) that run "make build-efi-vm" or "make build-vm" and optionally test the VM, storing logs as artifacts. In the publish stage add .docker_publish_template (runs podman load/push of OCI images, logs digests), .snap_publish_template (pushes snaps with snapcraft after checking credentials), .publish_tar_template (exports tarballs and uploads to S3 via aws CLI), and .reproducible_template (runs buildstream-reprotest and saves results), each with appropriate artifact paths, retry policies, and rules that trigger on tags, schedules, or manual execution; the .license_checker job runs bst_license_checker with defined variables and caches its working directory.
